productDisplayName: Fila Men Grey & Blue Jaquared Shoes
description: Style Note The fila Jaquared slip-on with its minimal styling is perfect for all off-duty events. Referencing the sport shoe but with added details for weekend comfort, this slip-on can be worn with polo tees and jeans. Product Details Grey slip-on with suede upper, synthetic overlays and velcro closure straps on the tongue Padded inner and meshed tongue Outsole adhered to the upper Textured TPU outsole with diamond shaped lug on the heel and hexagonal nubs on the midfoot Material and Care Synthetic, suede Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
